title: chrysothamnus graveolens
intro: Chrysothamnus graveolens, also known as desert chamomile or gray rabbitbrush, is a shrub-like plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and digestive issues. Desert chamomile can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
